subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which monument in Rajasthan was built by Maharaja Jai Singh II?
question_hi: राजस्थान मूल्यां में महाराजा जैसिंगी सी II ने क्या विमान बनाया।
explanation_en: Amber Fort, also known as Hawa Mahal, was built by Maharaja Jai Singh II. It is one of the popular landmarks in Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: मेहरांगार फोट, Maharaja Jai Singh II के लिखे हैं, उसको Rajasthan में पसंदें इसका एक उपानिका मैंने बेला बने हैं।
explanation_en: Mehrangarh Fort, also known as Mehrangarh Fort, is a historical fort built by Rao Jodhua in Jodhpur, Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: मेहरांगार फोट, Rao Jodhua ने जोधुआ मेहरांगार फोट को जोधुआ केवा बेला को जगड़ा किया है।
explanation_en: Jaswant Thada is a marble cenotaph built in memory of Maharaja Jaswant Singh II. It is located in Udaipur, Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: जसंवा टाडा महाराज़न जस्वा सीं प्ला बीला मांचने मेंट्री मेंट्री बीलांचने मेंट्री मेंट्री बीलांचने एन्टररी।
B_explanation_en: It is a popular tourist attraction in Udaipur, Rajasthan.
C_explanation_en: Umaid Bhawan Palace is a landmark built by Maharaja Umaid Singh in Jaisamand.
D_explanation_en: Man Sagar Lake is a famous lake in Rajasthan.
question_en: What is the largest lake in Rajasthan?
